home.hero_heading:
Quiet vessels,
shaped slowly,
fired with care.
home.studio_heading:
Made and signed
by one pair
of hands.
home.studio_body: I work from a small studio, throwing stoneware and porcelain in small batches. Every piece keeps the marks of how it was made, so no two come out quite the same.
home.manifesto_col1: I throw, trim and glaze each piece by hand. The work keeps a record of how it was made, and no two are the same.
home.manifesto_col2: For me, ceramics and design share the same concerns: material, colour, texture. Useful things, quietly made, to live with for years.

about.statement1: I throw stoneware and porcelain in small batches, and sign each piece by hand.
about.plate_heading:
Made by hand,
no two the same.
about.plate_col1: I throw stoneware and porcelain in small batches, and sign each piece by hand. The work keeps a record of how it was made.
about.plate_col2: Small movement at the rim, depth in the glaze where the flame caught. The marks of the making, quietly left in.
about.bio:
I'm New Zealand-born and Auckland-based, and I work between New Zealand and Australia.

For over twenty years I worked in interior design, on residential projects across Australia and New Zealand, and in furniture in Australia and Singapore. For the last six years I've worked in clay, designing and making collections for private clients and international houses, among them Aesop.

For me, ceramics and interior design share the same concerns: material, colour, and texture. Objects of beauty and simplicity, made for the spaces we live in.

Working with clay lets me make with my hands and bring a designer's eye to the medium. It has brought me an enormous amount of joy, and there's always something new to learn and to share.

commissions.hero_heading:
Made by hand,
for the space.
commissions.intro: I make ceramic lighting and custom work for homes and commercial interiors, each piece handcrafted and developed in collaboration with architects and designers.
commissions.pendant_body:
I design and make bespoke ceramic pendant lighting for residential and commercial projects, handcrafting each piece so it holds a high level of refinement and consistency.

Every work is developed alongside architects and designers, with careful thought given to scale, proportion, the quality of light, materiality, and the space it lives in. Forms are hand-built in high-fired ceramic, with controlled geometry, subtle surface variation, and custom glazes matched to the interior palette.

Each piece is made as an integrated lighting element, bringing clarity, warmth, and cohesion to the room.
commissions.wall_body:
I design and hand-make bespoke ceramic wall and feature lighting.

Each piece is quietly refined: design-led, materially driven, and individually formed. Through a careful balance of proportion, texture, and light, every work is made in response to its setting.

The result is a singular object, precise, atmospheric, and enduring, made to sit seamlessly in a space while leaving a lasting impression.
commissions.lamps_body:
I make bespoke, one-of-a-kind lamps for individual spaces, each one hand-crafted to balance sculptural form, materiality, and refined detail.

They're made to perform as beautifully as they look, with thought given to both function and atmosphere. Clay bodies, tones, and finishes are tailored to suit each interior.

Working with specialist electrical technicians, I deliver considered lighting with seamless integration and intuitive control, where every detail is quietly resolved.
commissions.closer:
Every commission begins
with a conversation.
commissions.quote: Each work is made in response to its setting: precise, atmospheric, and enduring, made to sit seamlessly in a space while leaving a lasting impression.
